attributes.action: Create mechanism to remove discrimination from elections and elected office
attributes.additional_details: Our system needs to be updated in line with the evolution of our nation into a free and fair society. Equal rights are now at the core of our national identity, and our public officials must lead the way. In the modern age it has become problematic on occasions when information has come to light which reveals that due to prejudicial views, a candidate or official is unsuited to a role which requires them to represent everyone with fairness and respect. Our system must protect our communities.
attributes.background: When indisputable information comes to light that reveals a candidate or person in the office of MP, mayor or councillor holds discriminatory views, they must be removed from the ballot paper or their post, so that all members of the public can receive proper representation.

rejection.details: It is unclear how it would be determined whether an individual holds discriminatory views, and who such views would be held against.
